intent: 2BR / 1 bath, mid-band hall, combined great room, no carport. 11x9 lot gives a 7x5 envelope = 35 m2 floor -- the shallow-depth end of the wide single-bath hall program. The ld sibling (1s_2br_wd_side_split_bath_hall_ld) needs buildable depth >= 6 m for its living/dining/kitchen split and can't reach depth 5, so this gr (combined great_room + kitchen, 2-deep public stack) is the topology to use here. Single common bath at the rear next to kitchen; a hallway is tucked into the middle band -- both bedrooms and the common bath door onto the hall; hall opens east into the great room.
must_haves: common bath accessible from the hall
mid-band hallway serving both bedrooms and the common bath
